title: 觀梅占 (Plum Blossom Observation)

algorithmic_inputs.date: 辰年十二月十七日申時

judgment_steps.content: 兌為少女 → 女子
judgment_steps.reasoning: Trigram象 mapped to person type: 兌 = youngest daughter → young woman

judgment_steps.content: 巽為股 → 傷股 (injury to thigh)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Trigram body-part mapping: 巽 = thigh. 巽 is克'd by 乾金兑金 → thigh is injured

judgment_steps.content: 互中巽木又逢乾金兑金克之 → 巽木被傷
judgment_steps.reasoning: Combined multiple克 relations on 巽 to conclude injury, not just misfortune

judgment_steps.content: 克體之卦氣盛 (克體 signals dominate)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Counted克體 vs 生體: 離火克兌金 + 巽木生離火 = overwhelming克, so outcome is negative

judgment_steps.content: 變為艮土, 兌金得生 → 不至凶危
judgment_steps.reasoning: 變卦 provides a生體 signal (艮土生兌金), overriding the dominant克 to prevent death

judgment_steps.content: 明晚 (timing from context)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Tomorrow evening predicted — timing derived from the situation (plum viewing) not from卦 numerics

outcome: 明晚有女子折花，園丁逐之，女子失驚墜地，傷其股。不至凶危。

title: 牡丹占 (Peony Divination)

judgment_steps.content: 互卦又見重乾，克體之卦多矣，卦中無生意
judgment_steps.reasoning: Extreme imbalance: ALL signals克體, zero生體 → destruction certain

judgment_steps.content: 乾為馬 → 被馬踐毀
judgment_steps.reasoning: Trigram象: 乾 = horse. Since乾 is the克ing force, destruction comes via horses

judgment_steps.content: 午時 = 離明之象 → timing
judgment_steps.reasoning: 午 = noon = 離(fire/brightness). Used branch-trigram correspondence for timing

outcome: 明日午時，貴官觀牡丹，二馬相嚙，群至花間馳驟，花盡為之踐毀。

title: 鄰夜扣門借物占 (Neighbor Knocking at Night)

wuxing_relations: 三乾金, 二巽木 → 金木之物

judgment_steps.content: 三乾金, 二巽木 → 金木之物
judgment_steps.reasoning: 五行 composition directly maps to material composition: metal+wood object

judgment_steps.content: 乾金短, 巽木長 → 斧
judgment_steps.reasoning: Relative proportion: metal is shorter than wood handle → axe shape

judgment_steps.content: 夕晚安用鋤？必借斧。蓋斧切於劈柴之用耳。
judgment_steps.reasoning: Time-of-day reasoning: evening → need to chop firewood, not hoe. EXPLICITLY teaches: 推數又須明理

title: 今日動靜如何 (Today's Fortune)

judgment_steps.content: 升者, 有升階之義 → going up (to someone's house)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Hexagram name meaning: 升 = ascending → being invited up/elevated

judgment_steps.content: 互震兌有東西席之分
judgment_steps.reasoning: 互卦 trigram positions mapped to seating arrangement at a banquet

judgment_steps.content: 兌為口, 坤為腹 → 口腹之事 (dining)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Body part象: mouth + belly = eating/dining occasion

judgment_steps.content: 客不多: 坤土獨立, 無同類之卦氣
judgment_steps.reasoning: Counted坤's party: only one坤, no allies → few guests

judgment_steps.content: 酒不醉: 卦中無坎
judgment_steps.reasoning: Absence reasoning: no坎(water) → no heavy drinking

judgment_steps.content: 坤為黍稷 → 味止黍雞
judgment_steps.reasoning: 坤's food象 = grain/millet. Specific menu predicted from trigram associations

judgment_steps.content: 卦無相生之義 → 酒不多, 食品不豐
judgment_steps.reasoning: Overall harmony assessment: no mutual生 = modest affair

outcome: 今日有人相請, 客不多, 酒不醉, 味至黍雞而已。果然。

title: 西林寺牌額占 (Temple Sign)

judgment_steps.content: 寺者純陽之所居, 今卦得重陰之爻 → 不吉
judgment_steps.reasoning: OVERRIDES the比和(normally吉) reading. Context: Buddhist temple = pure陽 place, but卦 is pure陰 → contradiction

judgment_steps.content: 群陰剝陽 → 陰人之禍
judgment_steps.reasoning: Hexagram name/meaning: 剝 = stripping away. 陰 overwhelming 陽 → women causing trouble in monks' quarters

judgment_steps.content: Remedy: add hooks to 林 → changes卦 to 山澤損 → 吉
judgment_steps.reasoning: Physical intervention changes the numerological input → new卦 is favorable. Practitioner intervenes in causality.

outcome: 寺中果有陰人之禍。添林字兩鉤後，寺果無事。

title: 老人有憂色占 (Worried Old Man)

judgment_steps.content: 易辭: 包無魚, 起凶 → 不吉
judgment_steps.reasoning: 爻辭 consulted AND found consonant with卦理 (both negative)

judgment_steps.content: 巽木為體, 乾金克之, 互卦重乾俱克體, 無生氣
judgment_steps.reasoning: All signals克體, zero生體 → certain disaster

judgment_steps.content: 時在途行, 其應速 → 取成卦之數中分其半 → 5日
judgment_steps.reasoning: Practitioner's own motion state (walking) determines speed of outcome. Then halves the total卦 number to get the day count.

judgment_steps.content: 包無魚 + 卦象 → 魚骨鯁而終
judgment_steps.reasoning: 爻辭 mentions 'no fish' → death comes via fish (fish bone choking). Ironic inversion of the text.

outcome: 五日後赴吉席, 因魚骨鯁而終。

title: 少年有喜色占 (Happy Young Man)

judgment_steps.content: 爻辭: 賁於丘園, 束帛戔戔, 吝終吉 → 吉 + 聘幣
judgment_steps.reasoning: 爻辭 mentions 束帛(bundled silk) = betrothal gifts. Combined with卦理(生體) = engagement

judgment_steps.content: 離為體, 互變俱生之 → 大吉
judgment_steps.reasoning: All互 and變卦 signals生體 → strongly positive outcome

judgment_steps.content: 束帛戔戔 → 聘幣之喜
judgment_steps.reasoning: Silk gifts in爻辭 → betrothal/engagement gifts. Direct textual-to-situational analogy.

judgment_steps.content: 十七日內 (from total number 17)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Timing from the sum of numbers used to construct the卦

outcome: 十七日內必有聘幣之喜。至期果然定親。

title: 牛哀鳴占 (Ox Mournful Cry)

wuxing_relations: 互變俱克體(震木克坤土)

judgment_steps.content: 爻辭: 師或輿尸, 凶 → combined with卦理
judgment_steps.reasoning: 爻辭 says 'army transports corpses' = death. Consonant with克體 signals.

judgment_steps.content: 坤為體, 互變俱克之, 無生氣
judgment_steps.reasoning: All signals克體, zero生 → certain death for the animal

judgment_steps.content: 二十一日 (from total number 21: 坎6+坤8+午7)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Timing from卦 construction numbers

outcome: 二十一日內必遭屠殺。二十日果買此牛殺以犒眾。

title: 雞悲鳴占 (Chicken Sad Cry)

judgment_steps.content: 爻辭: 有孚, 血去惕出, 無咎 → 推之割雞之義
judgment_steps.reasoning: 血去 = blood removed → interpreted as slaughter/butchering

judgment_steps.content: 巽木離火 → 烹飪之象
judgment_steps.reasoning: Wood + fire in卦 = cooking imagery. The chicken will be cooked.

judgment_steps.content: 十日 (from total number 10: 巽5+乾1+卯4)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Timing from卦 construction numbers

outcome: 十日當烹。果十日客至, 有烹雞之驗。

title: 枯枝墜地占 (Dead Branch Falls)

wuxing_relations: 睽損卦名皆有傷殘之義

judgment_steps.content: 爻辭: 睽孤, 遇元夫 + 卦理俱凶
judgment_steps.reasoning: Both爻辭 and五行 analysis point to damage/loss

judgment_steps.content: 睽損卦名俱有傷殘之義
judgment_steps.reasoning: Hexagram NAMES as semantic content: 睽(discord) + 損(diminish) = damage

judgment_steps.content: 十日 → 伐樹起公榭, 匠者適字元夫
judgment_steps.reasoning: The爻辭 character 元夫 matched the carpenter's actual name. Textual coincidence becomes prophetic.

outcome: 十日當伐。果十日伐樹起公榭, 匠者適字元夫。

title: 籠盛物占 (Basket of Objects)

judgment_steps.content: 互震兌 → 草木類生土中, 色青根黃
judgment_steps.reasoning: 震=wood/green, 兌=yellow → green plant with yellow root

judgment_steps.content: 爻辭: 拔茅茹, 以其彙 → 連根之草木, 幹根之草木
judgment_steps.reasoning: 爻辭 about pulling up thatch by the roots directly describes the object

judgment_steps.content: 互震為青色, 兌為黃根
judgment_steps.reasoning: Color assignments from trigram associations

outcome: 草木連根, 新採於土中。互震為青色, 兌為黃根。

title: 鐘覆物占 (Object Under Bell)

judgment_steps.content: 有聲價氣勢之物 → valuable
judgment_steps.reasoning: 鼎 = cauldron/vessel of state → object of value and authority

judgment_steps.content: 互乾兌雖圓而毀 → round but broken
judgment_steps.reasoning: 乾=round/complete + 兌=broken/damaged → round object with damage

judgment_steps.content: 爻辭: 鼎玉鉉, 大吉 → 玉 + 其色白可用
judgment_steps.reasoning: 爻辭 mentions jade → white precious object

outcome: 玉綬環, 果破矣。(Jade belt ring, indeed broken.)

title: 澤火革之傷股 (Revolution Hexagram - Thigh Injury)

judgment_steps.content: 兌金為少女, 離火克之 → 少女受傷
judgment_steps.reasoning: 兌=young woman, fire克金 → young woman is harmed

judgment_steps.content: 巽為股, 乾金克之 → 傷股
judgment_steps.reasoning: 巽=thigh, metal克wood → thigh injury

judgment_steps.content: 得艮土生入兌金 → 不至於死
judgment_steps.reasoning: 變卦 provides rescue signal: 艮土生兌金 → survival

outcome: 少女傷股, 不至於死。

title: 田姓起造占 (House Building - Tian Family)

algorithmic_inputs.date: 寅年十二月初一日午時

judgment_steps.content: 用坎水生體, 雖兌金克, 有離火制金
judgment_steps.reasoning: 生體 dominant, 克體 neutralized by離 → overall positive but with caveats

judgment_steps.content: 酉年月日有損失之憂 (兌金旺時)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Timing of misfortune tied to when the克體 element is seasonally strong

judgment_steps.content: 亥子水年月日有進益 (坎水旺時)
judgment_steps.reasoning: Timing of fortune tied to when the生體 element is seasonally strong

judgment_steps.content: 家必多口舌之聒, 亦為兌也
judgment_steps.reasoning: 兌 = mouth/speech → household arguments. Even when兌 isn't dominant, its象 manifests.

judgment_steps.content: 木體近春, 喜逢坎水 → 必能發旺
judgment_steps.reasoning: 季節 resonance: wood體 + spring season + water生 = flourishing

judgment_steps.content: 二十九年後此屋當毀 (全卦成數). 若非有兌, 再見二十九年無恙。
judgment_steps.reasoning: Lifespan from total卦 number. 兌's presence halves the durability.

outcome: 此居必能發旺, 但多口舌。二十九年後此屋當毀。

title: 姤之鼎卦 葬地占 (Burial Site Divination)

algorithmic_inputs.key_lines: 世持辛丑, 伏甲子金
algorithmic_inputs.six_relations: 壬申化己未火, 火克本宮為鬼

judgment_steps.content: 世下伏金 → 土中有石
judgment_steps.reasoning: 辛丑(earth) conceals 甲子(metal) → earth containing stone

judgment_steps.content: 巽下伏乾 → 乾為大赤 → 石色大赤
judgment_steps.reasoning: Concealed乾 trigram → red color attribute

judgment_steps.content: 壬申化己未火, 火克本宮為鬼 → 伏屍鬼
judgment_steps.reasoning: Transformation producing fire克 = ghost/corpse spirit

judgment_steps.content: 申化未 → 西南方
judgment_steps.reasoning: Branch transformation gives directional reading

judgment_steps.content: 距離計算: 壬申金重數4 + 丑未土5 = 40步
judgment_steps.reasoning: Numerical computation from stem-branch values for physical distance

judgment_steps.content: 壬申乃劍鋒金 → 刀傷之人
judgment_steps.reasoning: 納音 five-phase (劍鋒金 = sword-edge metal) → cause of death was blade

judgment_steps.content: 壬午乃楊柳木 → 柳樹旁
judgment_steps.reasoning: 納音 identification: 壬午 = willow wood → near willow tree

outcome: 掘地五尺土中有石, 其色大赤, 離穴四十步西南近柳樹有伏屍, 葬出刀傷之人, 並主火災。

title: 天水訟卦求財 (Seeking Wealth)

wuxing_relations: 體生用(乾金生坎水) → 泄己之氣

judgment_steps.content: 體生用 → 泄己之氣, 其財空望
judgment_steps.reasoning: 體 feeds用 (gold produces water) → energy drain, wealth unobtainable

judgment_steps.content: 得離卦屬火能克金 + 午時客來食去酒 → 消耗
judgment_steps.reasoning: 離 fire克體金 + temporal context = loss through hospitality expenses

outcome: 財空望, 午時客來食去酒, 返自消耗。
